title: neomolina potosina
intro: Neomolina potosina is a plant species native to Mexico, scientifically classified as a member of the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomolina potosina include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in wound healing and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Neomolina potosina can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the leaves to use in salves and ointments.
